title: Chimes
description: Wind chimes that create ambient noises for your base.
body:
![Wind Chime Variants](https://i.imgur.com/GDC5jix.png)
![Wind Bells](https://i.imgur.com/ie3IVBy.png)
# Dev Note: Chimes for Modrinth is slowly releasing for versions 1.20.1 through 1.21.5. Stay tuned as they roll out!

# Chimes 
####  Add the sound of Chimes to your Minecraft world!

Chimes is a Minecraft mod that introduces Wind Chimes into the game. Wind Chimes create ambient sounds when hung from supporting blocks and prevent nearby Phantoms from approaching! 
> ### More detailed information can be found in the following


## Wind Chime Blocks & Crafting🎐
There are currently **six types of Wind Chimes**, with more planned to come! 
<details>  
<summary> More about each Wind Chime </summary>  
  
>### Bamboo Wind Chime:
>- Procused ambient Bamboo Clacking sounds when hung
>- Obtainable through crafting with 1 wooden slab, 1 string, and 1 bamboo
>- Produces falling Bamboo Leaf Particles
>- Can be tied/silenced


>### Iron Wind Chime:
>- Produces ambient metallic sounds when hung
>- Obtainable through crafting with 1 wooden slab, 1 chain, and 1 iron ingot
>- Produces falling Bamboo Leaf Particles
>- Can be tied/silenced


>### Carved Bamboo Wind Chime:
>- A carved variant of the Bamboo Wind Chime that produces a deeper-pitched clacking sound compared to its counterpart in addition to its carved model
>- Obtainable by right-clicking a Bamboo Wind Chime with an Axe!
>- Does **not** produce falling Bamboo Leaf Particles
>- Can be tied/silenced


>### Copper Wind Chime:
>- Produces unique deep-pitched ambient sounds when hung
>- Obtainable through crafting with 1 wooden slab, 1 string, and 1 copper ingot
>- Can be tied/silenced

>### Amethyst Crystal Wind Chime:
>- Procused ambient shimmering sounds when hung
>- Obtainable through crafting with 1 iron ingot, 1 string, and 1 amethyst shard
>- Emits light at a level of 7!

>### Glass Wind Bell:
>- A Wind Chime like no other,,, that it's a Wind Bell!
>- Glass Wind Bells are fully customizable from Glass to Windsail.
>- Craft a Wind Bell with 1 string, 1 glass bottle, and 1 paper
>- Customize your Wind Bell by applying a Dye above or below the slot of a Glass Wind Bell Item in a crafting table
>- You can wash off your design by right-clicking on a water source block with a customized Wind Bell Item in hand.
> ![Wind Bells Crafting](https://i.imgur.com/kN96apQ.png)
</details>

### Tying Wind Chimes 
> - Some Wind Chimes can be tied/untied to toggle on/off ambient sounds in-game
> - You can tie/untie a wind chime by **crouching + right-clicking** a Wind Chime with an empty hand

### Keep Phantoms away 
> - Phantoms do not attack players who are within a certain radius of a Wind Chime. 
> - You can tie/untie Wind Chimes to toggle this effect

### Wind Chime Animations
> - Each Wind Chime is set with ambient and interactive animations!
> - For Chimes v2.0 on Forge, you can toggle animations on an off in the client config
> - More customization options will be introduced in the future


 ## FAQ
> - **Chimes** supports Forge, Fabric, and NeoForged mod loaders
> - Wind Chime volume can be controlled under the Ambient/Environment Sound Category
> - You may use Chimes in your mod pack as long as we remain credited.
